tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Module verification, vet, unit tests, race tests, reproducible linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 builds, daemon, MCP and worker smoke tests, 36 Python tests, and repository validation passed.

tests.name: final public implementation workflow
tests.summary: The exact public implementation commit passed repository quality and PostgreSQL durability validation.

tests.name: complete PostgreSQL integration and rollback target
coverage: atomic hierarchical lease acquisition, renewal, release, replacement, and fencing
attempt-scoped delivery authorization and outbox reconstruction
real Git publication and crash recovery after compare-and-swap
end-to-end approved worker execution and same-delivery retry authorization
legacy blocked-run projection replay without runtime authority expansion
Sprint 05 rollback through migrations 006-004 against the Sprint 04 binary
durable process restart and canonical-state preservation

tests.name: worktree, validation, publication, and recovery suites
coverage: symlink, hidden-index, ignored-file, out-of-scope, and repository-redirection rejection
quarantine replay, reconciliation markers, fsync chains, and missing-path inference
canonical commit, patch, tree, changed-path, report, manifest, and receipt identities
caller cancellation, heartbeat loss, stale fences, concurrent completion, and lease cleanup
journal-only recovery after validation evidence loss without a new Git CAS
